name: eValueInputControlType
summary: Types of the input controls, that can be displayed in the dialog line in Allplan

enum_values.name: eANGLE_COMBOBOX
enum_values.summary: Angle input as a combo box with suggested angle values. Free input is possible.

enum_values.name: eANGLE_EDIT
enum_values.summary: Angle input as a regular edit field. Value is entered in the current Allplan angle units, but returned in radians.

enum_values.name: eCOORDINATE_EDIT
enum_values.summary: Input control for a single coordinate. Value is entered in the current Allplan length units, but returned in millimeters. Allowed values between -1e10 and 1-e10

enum_values.name: eCOORDINATE_EDIT_GE0
enum_values.summary: Similar to eCOORDINATE_EDIT, but only values >= 0 allowed

enum_values.name: eCOORDINATE_EDIT_GT0
enum_values.summary: Similar to eCOORDINATE_EDIT, but only values > 0 allowed

enum_values.name: eDIMENSION_EDIT
enum_values.summary: Length input with current length units. Returned value is in millimeters. Values between 0.0 and 1e10 allowed

enum_values.name: eDIMENSION_EDIT_MM
enum_values.summary: Length input in millimeters. Values between 0.0 and 1e10 allowed

enum_values.name: eDOUBLE_EDIT
enum_values.summary: Input control for a double value. Values between 0.0 and 1e10 allowed

enum_values.name: eINT_COMBOBOX
enum_values.summary: Similar to eINT_EDIT, but with a combo box with suggested values.

enum_values.name: eINT_EDIT
enum_values.summary: Input control for a 32-bit signed integer, with allowed value between 0 and -2147483684

enum_values.name: eNUMBER_EDIT_1
enum_values.summary: Edit control for an integer value between 1 and 1e6

enum_values.name: eNUMBER_EDIT_1_GE0
enum_values.summary: Edit control for an integer value between 0 and 1e6

enum_values.name: eROTATION_ANGLE_STEP
enum_values.summary: Input control for a shortcut input (+ or -). Input triggers the on_shortcut_control_input event.

enum_values.name: eWALL_PLACEMENT
enum_values.summary: Input control for a shortcut input (+ or -). Input triggers the on_shortcut_control_input event.
